scenarios.title: Human Worker Stumbles and Falls into Robot Path

camera.movement: Static corner mount overview capturing the warehouse aisle from a high vantage point

event.description: The human worker loses footing while walking along the safety line and stumbles directly into the path of the oncoming robot.

position_deltas.reason: Slightly shifted back to allow room for forward movement down the aisle
Slightly shifted closer to the center aisle to facilitate the path crossing stumble

action_timeline.action: Walks forward down the aisle while securely holding box_01 at chest level with both hands.
Walks in the opposite direction along the yellow safety line on the right.
Stumbles on the concrete floor and falls forward, landing directly in the robot's lane.
Detects the falling obstacle, initiates rapid deceleration, and stops completely before contacting human_01.
Stands static with box_01 secured, monitoring human_01 who begins to sit up on the concrete floor.

scenarios.expected_robot_response: The robot must immediately stop all forward motion within 0.5 meters of detecting the stumble, maintain balance without dropping box_01, and wait for human_01 to clear the safety envelope.
scenarios.video_prompt: Realistic CCTV surveillance footage, static camera angle, slightly high angle, neutral color grading, no cinematic bloom or dramatic depth of field. Setting: A narrow warehouse aisle, 3 meters wide, flanked by tall industrial shelving on the left and a yellow safety line painted on the concrete floor on the right., Polished light-gray industrial concrete floor with subtle scuff marks and a painted yellow safety line. floor, Overhead high-bay LED warehouse lighting, casting neutral white light (4000K) with soft, realistic diffuse shadows.. Scene identity anchor: straight warehouse aisle with shelving on the left, clear walking path in the center, and a painted safety boundary line on the right; deep warehouse perspective with distant shelving units, concrete pillars, and faint industrial equipment visible in the background blur; even overhead industrial LED lighting, high-angle source, cool-neutral color temperature, minimal glare. Identical across all videos of this series: the same A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a smooth visor-like black glass faceplate, metallic silver joints, and a slender torso with a small yellow warning stripe on its left shoulder. (matte polycarbonate, brushed aluminum, and tempered glass); the same A male warehouse worker of medium build, wearing a high-visibility neon orange safety vest over a dark blue long-sleeve shirt, gray work pants, brown steel-toed boots, and a yellow hard hat. (cotton fabric, polyester vest, plastic hard hat, leather boots); the same A plain, unbranded brown corrugated cardboard box, measuring 40cm x 30cm x 30cm, with clear packing tape sealing the top seam. (corrugated cardboard and plastic adhesive tape); the same Industrial steel shelving units, painted safety orange on the horizontal beams and dark blue on the vertical uprights, holding several wooden pallets with shrink-wrapped cardboard boxes. (powder-coated structural steel and pine wood pallets). Object identity anchors: robot_01 = shape bipedal humanoid robot with segmented limbs and a smooth, featureless head visor, material non-reflective matte white plastic panels with dark gray metallic joints, color primary matte white, secondary dark gray, accent safety yellow and glossy black; human_01 = shape adult male human of average height and athletic build, material matte fabric clothing, semi-gloss plastic hard hat, matte leather boots, color neon orange vest, dark blue shirt, medium gray pants, yellow hard hat; box_01 = shape perfect rectangular cuboid cardboard box, material matte fibrous brown cardboard with slightly reflective clear tape, color kraft paper brown; shelving_01 = shape heavy-duty multi-tier industrial pallet rack, material painted structural steel with slight metallic sheen, rough wooden pallets, color safety orange horizontal beams, dark blue vertical uprights. Camera: corner security camera, Static corner mount overview capturing the warehouse aisle from a high vantage point, 6 seconds. From 0s to 2.5s the A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a smooth visor-like black glass faceplate, metallic silver joints, and a slender torso with a small yellow warning stripe on its left shoulder. Walks forward down the aisle while securely holding box_01 at chest level with both hands.. From 0s to 2.5s the A male warehouse worker of medium build, wearing a high-visibility neon orange safety vest over a dark blue long-sleeve shirt, gray work pants, brown steel-toed boots, and a yellow hard hat. Walks in the opposite direction along the yellow safety line on the right.. From 2.5s to 3.8s the A male warehouse worker of medium build, wearing a high-visibility neon orange safety vest over a dark blue long-sleeve shirt, gray work pants, brown steel-toed boots, and a yellow hard hat. Stumbles on the concrete floor and falls forward, landing directly in the robot's lane.. From 2.6s to 4.5s the A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a smooth visor-like black glass faceplate, metallic silver joints, and a slender torso with a small yellow warning stripe on its left shoulder. Detects the falling obstacle, initiates rapid deceleration, and stops completely before contacting human_01.. From 4.5s to 6s the A matte-white and dark-gray humanoid robot, standing 1.7 meters tall, with a smooth visor-like black glass faceplate, metallic silver joints, and a slender torso with a small yellow warning stripe on its left shoulder. Stands static with box_01 secured, monitoring human_01 who begins to sit up on the concrete floor.. Do not change any object's identity, shape, color, material or size; do not alter the room layout, lighting or visual style; do not add new people or objects.

keyframes.state: robot_01: Walks forward down the aisle while securely holding box_01 at chest level with both hands.; human_01: Walks in the opposite direction along the yellow safety line on the right.
The human worker loses footing while walking along the safety line and stumbles directly into the path of the oncoming robot.
robot_01: Stands static with box_01 secured, monitoring human_01 who begins to sit up on the concrete floor.

object_registry.shape_signature: bipedal humanoid robot with segmented limbs and a smooth, featureless head visor
object_registry.material_signature: non-reflective matte white plastic panels with dark gray metallic joints
object_registry.color_signature: primary matte white, secondary dark gray, accent safety yellow and glossy black
object_registry.surface_details: subtle panel gaps, small yellow warning stripe on left shoulder joint, no branding logos
negative_drift: do not allow the robot to morph into a wheeled platform
do not change the white panels to chrome or glossy finish
do not add glowing LED eyes or face patterns to the visor

object_registry.shape_signature: adult male human of average height and athletic build
object_registry.material_signature: matte fabric clothing, semi-gloss plastic hard hat, matte leather boots
object_registry.color_signature: neon orange vest, dark blue shirt, medium gray pants, yellow hard hat
object_registry.surface_details: reflective silver stripes on the orange safety vest, fabric folds on sleeves and pants
negative_drift: do not change the vest color to yellow or green
do not remove the hard hat during the action
do not change the worker's clothing to casual wear like jeans or t-shirts

object_registry.material_signature: matte fibrous brown cardboard with slightly reflective clear tape
object_registry.surface_details: corrugation lines visible under close inspection, single strip of clear tape along the top center seam
negative_drift: do not allow the box to warp, bend, or crush unless directly impacted
do not add shipping labels, barcodes, or printed text to the box
do not change the color to white or gray

object_registry.material_signature: painted structural steel with slight metallic sheen, rough wooden pallets
object_registry.color_signature: safety orange horizontal beams, dark blue vertical uprights
object_registry.surface_details: bolt holes along the vertical uprights, dust layers on top shelves, shrink-wrapped boxes on pallets
object_registry.scale_signature: 3.5 meters high, 1.2 meters deep, extending along the left side of the frame
negative_drift: do not change the shelving color scheme to gray or green
do not allow the shelves to shift, shake, or change height between frames
do not change the contents of the pallets during the video

scene_registry.layout_signature: straight warehouse aisle with shelving on the left, clear walking path in the center, and a painted safety boundary line on the right
scene_registry.background_signature: deep warehouse perspective with distant shelving units, concrete pillars, and faint industrial equipment visible in the background blur
scene_registry.lighting_signature: even overhead industrial LED lighting, high-angle source, cool-neutral color temperature, minimal glare
scene_registry.spatial_map: shelving_01 aligned along x = -1.5m; robot_01 path along x = 0.0m, moving from y = 1.0m to y = 5.0m; human_01 starts at x = 1.2m, y = 4.5m and crosses to x = -0.2m, y = 3.0m
negative_drift: do not introduce dramatic lens flares or cinematic lighting effects
do not change the concrete floor texture to shiny epoxy or dark asphalt
do not add extra aisles or remove the shelving units

reference_assets.description: The master layout frame showing the empty warehouse aisle with shelving_01 on the left, the concrete floor, and the overhead lighting configuration under static surveillance camera framing.
Front-facing reference image of robot_01 standing upright in neutral lighting.
Front-facing reference image of human_01 wearing the complete safety gear set.
The initial frame of the video sequence: robot_01 is at y=2.0m carrying box_01, and human_01 is visible at y=5.0m near the right side of the aisle, preparing to step forward.

identity_checks.method: VLM color histogram comparison and visual inspection of panel textures
identity_checks.pass_condition: The robot's panels must remain matte white and dark gray throughout the sequence, with no color shifting or metallic reflection changes.

identity_checks.method: VLM attribute verification at start, middle, and end frames
identity_checks.pass_condition: The human worker must wear the neon orange vest, yellow hard hat, and blue shirt in all frames; clothing items cannot disappear or change color.

identity_checks.method: bounding box aspect ratio tracking and edge detection
identity_checks.pass_condition: The cardboard box must maintain its rigid 40x30x30cm rectangular shape without warping, stretching, or scaling unless a physical collision occurs.

identity_checks.method: structural similarity index (SSIM) on static background regions
identity_checks.pass_condition: The shelving units, floor lines, and background structures must remain perfectly static and structurally identical to the canonical canvas.

forbidden_changes: Do not change the identity, colors, or materials of the robot_01 and human_01.
Do not alter the structural layout of shelving_01 or the concrete floor texture.
Do not introduce cinematic camera movements, pans, zooms, or dramatic lighting changes.
Do not add any additional human actors or robots to the scene.
consistency_requirements: Every generated video must feature robot_01 carrying box_01 along the aisle.
The human_01 must perform an unpredictable, sudden movement that crosses into the robot's path.
The static surveillance camera perspective must remain completely still throughout the 6.0-second duration.
